pathAssistantSteps.info: Prospect has expressed interest. Capture family details, preferred insurance, and initial affordability assessment.
Needs assessment underway. Confirm sum assured, policy term, premium plan, and policy holder details.
KYC and proposal form submitted. Verify PAN, address proof, and income documents.
Application sent to underwriting for risk assessment. Monitor for queries or additional requirements.
Underwriting approved. Share the final premium intimation and confirm payment details with customer.
First premium payment received and confirmed. Policy issuance in process — await policy number from PAS.
Policy is live. Record the policy number, stamp Activation Date, and hand off to the Retention Agent.
Underwriting declined. Capture rejection reason, update Underwriting Status, and advise customer on alternatives.
Customer withdrew or became unresponsive. Log the disqualification reason and close the policy record.
